Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
Enclosing class:
AccountGoalsUpdate
public static final class AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder extends Object

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AccountGoalsUpdate
    build()
     
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    investmentObjective(AccountGoalsUpdateInvestmentObjective investmentObjective)
    The financial goal or purpose that an investor has in mind when making investment decisions; firms often ask investors to specify their investment objectives when opening an account, in order to provide appropriate investment recommendations and manage risk appropriately
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    investmentObjective(Optional<? extends AccountGoalsUpdateInvestmentObjective> investmentObjective)
    The financial goal or purpose that an investor has in mind when making investment decisions; firms often ask investors to specify their investment objectives when opening an account, in order to provide appropriate investment recommendations and manage risk appropriately
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    liquidityNeeds(AccountGoalsUpdateLiquidityNeeds liquidityNeeds)
    An investor’s short-term cash requirements or the need to access funds quickly; it is important to consider an investor’s liquidity needs to ensure that they have sufficient cash or easily liquidated assets available to meet their financial obligations - this may include holding cash or cash equivalents
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    liquidityNeeds(Optional<? extends AccountGoalsUpdateLiquidityNeeds> liquidityNeeds)
    An investor’s short-term cash requirements or the need to access funds quickly; it is important to consider an investor’s liquidity needs to ensure that they have sufficient cash or easily liquidated assets available to meet their financial obligations - this may include holding cash or cash equivalents
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    riskTolerance(AccountGoalsUpdateRiskTolerance riskTolerance)
    An investor’s willingness and ability to tolerate risk when making investment decisions; reflects the investor’s comfort level with the potential ups and downs of the market and their ability to withstand potential losses
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    riskTolerance(Optional<? extends AccountGoalsUpdateRiskTolerance> riskTolerance)
    An investor’s willingness and ability to tolerate risk when making investment decisions; reflects the investor’s comfort level with the potential ups and downs of the market and their ability to withstand potential losses
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    timeHorizon(AccountGoalsUpdateTimeHorizon timeHorizon)
    TThe length of time an investor expects to hold an investment before selling it; this can affect the appropriate asset allocation and risk level for the portfolio
    AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder
    timeHorizon(Optional<? extends AccountGoalsUpdateTimeHorizon> timeHorizon)
    TThe length of time an investor expects to hold an investment before selling it; this can affect the appropriate asset allocation and risk level for the portfolio

  • Method Details

    • investmentObjective

      public AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder investmentObjective(AccountGoalsUpdateInvestmentObjective investmentObjective)
      The financial goal or purpose that an investor has in mind when making investment decisions; firms often ask investors to specify their investment objectives when opening an account, in order to provide appropriate investment recommendations and manage risk appropriately

    • investmentObjective

      public AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder investmentObjective(Optional<? extends AccountGoalsUpdateInvestmentObjective> investmentObjective)
      The financial goal or purpose that an investor has in mind when making investment decisions; firms often ask investors to specify their investment objectives when opening an account, in order to provide appropriate investment recommendations and manage risk appropriately

    • liquidityNeeds

      public AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder liquidityNeeds(AccountGoalsUpdateLiquidityNeeds liquidityNeeds)
      An investor’s short-term cash requirements or the need to access funds quickly; it is important to consider an investor’s liquidity needs to ensure that they have sufficient cash or easily liquidated assets available to meet their financial obligations - this may include holding cash or cash equivalents

    • liquidityNeeds

      public AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder liquidityNeeds(Optional<? extends AccountGoalsUpdateLiquidityNeeds> liquidityNeeds)
      An investor’s short-term cash requirements or the need to access funds quickly; it is important to consider an investor’s liquidity needs to ensure that they have sufficient cash or easily liquidated assets available to meet their financial obligations - this may include holding cash or cash equivalents

    • riskTolerance

      public AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder riskTolerance(AccountGoalsUpdateRiskTolerance riskTolerance)
      An investor’s willingness and ability to tolerate risk when making investment decisions; reflects the investor’s comfort level with the potential ups and downs of the market and their ability to withstand potential losses

    • riskTolerance

      public AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder riskTolerance(Optional<? extends AccountGoalsUpdateRiskTolerance> riskTolerance)
      An investor’s willingness and ability to tolerate risk when making investment decisions; reflects the investor’s comfort level with the potential ups and downs of the market and their ability to withstand potential losses

    • timeHorizon

      public AccountGoalsUpdate.Builder timeHorizon(AccountGoalsUpdateTimeHorizon timeHorizon)
